summary: ANDROID 🟥 DFU issues with Morpheus devices(VOY5200,VOY8200)
scenario: DFU issues on Morpheus devices: language update stuck at 99% for ~8 minutes, successful FW update still shows available update, and DFU stuck at 26% during an active call without expected pop-up.
description_clean:
Three DFU issues with Morpheus devices (VOY5200, VOY8200):

1. Language update stuck at 99% for ~8 minutes before completing (split to LMW-2609). Expected completion within 2 minutes.

2. After successful FW update, the device still shows an available update. Expected: device should be up to date after successful DFU.

3. During an active phone call, DFU process gets stuck at 26%. Expected: a pop-up should appear with text "Cannot update this device during a call".
steps: 1. Language update stuck at 99% for ~8 minutes before completing (split to LMW-2609).
2. After successful FW update, the device still shows an available update.
3. During an active phone call, DFU process gets stuck at 26%.
expected: 1. Language update completes within 2 minutes. 2. Device should be up to date after successful DFU. 3. A pop-up should appear with text "Cannot update this device during a call".
actual: 1. Language update stuck at 99% for ~8 minutes before completing. 2. After successful FW update, the device still shows an available update. 3. During an active phone call, DFU process gets stuck at 26%.
